content:
# Recommendations — for the iter-002 plan agent

## CRITICAL / must-fix-this-iter (block downstream work until addressed)

1. **FBC capstone signature gap (fbcg001 must-fix).** `baseChangeGammaPullbackEquiv` (FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean
   L328) and its helper `baseChangeEqLocusToPullbackGamma` are **not provable as typed** — they lack
   `[CompactSpace X] [QuasiSeparatedSpace X]`, which `thm:fbcb_global_direct` assumes and which sub-piece (b)
   `B ⊗ ∏_i (−) ≅ ∏_i (B ⊗ −)` needs (finiteness of the cover). Neither decl is in `archon-protected.yaml`,
   so the planner may change the signature. **Action:**
   - Ratify adding `[CompactSpace X] [QuasiSeparatedSpace X]` to both decls.
   - Switch the cover from `X.affineCover` (index `X.carrier`, infinite) to the finite
     `Scheme.exists_finite_affineCover_inter_isQuasiCompact` (already imported in the file).
   - This is a STRATEGY/signature decision → reflect it in the blueprint before re-dispatching a prover at
     this file (HARD GATE). Do NOT re-send a prover at `baseChangeEqLocusToPullbackGamma` until the
     signature + blueprint sub-block land.

## HIGH

2. **Cross-file prerequisite: `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` is `sorry` in `FlatBaseChange.lean`.** The FBC
   per-chart overlap identification (sorry (a) in `baseChangeEqLocusToPullbackGamma`) cannot close until this
   lands. `FlatBaseChange.lean` got no prover this iter (plan.md: "only in-file recipe is abandoned mate
   route"). The blueprint route for it is `lem:affine_base_change_pushforward`. Sequence: prove this BEFORE
   (or alongside) re-attempting the FBC capstone's per-chart core.

3. **SGR `private` decls break marker resolution (sgr001 major).** `tensorObjUnitIso` (L142) and
   `tensorBraiding` (L155) in SectionGradedRing.lean are `private`, but the blueprint `\lean{}` pins their
   public names (`AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.tensorObjUnitIso/tensorBraiding`, chapter L268/L292).
   `sync_leanok`/`blueprint-doctor` can't resolve a private name → these blocks never get an honest leanok.
   **Action:** dispatch a prover (Lean edit) to remove `private` from both. The `\lean{}` pins are correct;
   do NOT mangle them. (blueprint-doctor does not catch this class of bug — it only checks ref/uses/label.)

4. **Missing blueprint block: `baseChangeEqLocusToPullbackGamma` (fbcg001 major + unmatched-decl debt).**
   New helper, no `\lean{}` block. It is the per-chart core of `thm:fbcb_global_direct`. Have a
   blueprint-writer add a block between `lem:fbcb_baseChangeGammaEquiv` and `thm:fbcb_global_direct`:
   assumes qcqs; `\uses{lem:affine_base_change_pushforward, lem:fbcb_gammaTopEquivEqLocus, lem:pullback_spec_tilde_iso}`;
   proof sketch itemising (a) per-chart `Γ((U_i)_B,F')≅Γ(U_i,F)⊗_A B`, (b) finiteness of ι, (c) restriction-of-
   scalars transport along `pullbackGroundRingAlg`. Then add `\uses{<new block>}` to `thm:fbcb_global_direct`.

5. **Absent decl `flatBaseChange_isIso_iff_gammaTensorComparison` (fbcg001 major).** Blueprint block
   `lem:flat_base_change_reduce_global_sections` `\lean{}`-pins it, but only a TODO comment exists (L340–344).
   Its signature design was deferred pending the concrete capstone shape (plan.md iter-001 ## Next iter). Now
   that the capstone shape is concrete, this is the next reduction-lemma to scaffold — but it depends on
   reconciling the abstract-square `pushforwardBaseChangeMap` with the direct-B `baseChangeGammaPullbackEquiv`
   (the strategy's named-leg compatibility bridge). Treat as a strategy/scaffold item, not a blind prover send.

## Closest-to-completion / promising

6. **SGR coherence lemmas — prove the shared prereq FIRST.** The 4 sorries (`sectionsMul_one_mul` L1876,
   `_mul_one` L1884, `_mul_assoc` L1894, `_mul_comm` L1903 = `lem:sectionMul_coherent`) all bottleneck on one
   missing lemma: the **functor-composition split** `Γ((A ≪≫ B).hom)(s) = Γ(B.hom)(Γ(A.hom)(s))` at
   `.val.app ⊤`, proved WITHOUT `:= rfl` (the rfl form whnf-timeouts at 200000 hb). Recipe: `Iso.trans_hom`
   + `SheafOfModules.comp_val` (`Sheaf.lean:61`, rfl) + `NatTrans.comp_app` + term-mode ModuleCat comp-apply
   (the value-ModuleCat diamond — see PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base). The `sectionsCast_eqToIso_cancel`
   cancellation half is already proven and wired. Once the split lands, `sectionsMul_one_mul` reduces to the
   unitor-η core `Γ(λ_)(η(1⊗a))=a` (η-naturality vs presheaf left unitor + counit/unit triangle;
   Mathlib `toPresheaf_map_sheafificationAdjunction_unit_app`, `sheafificationAdjunction` triangle identities).
   **Dispatch ONE prover targeting the split lemma + `sectionsMul_one_mul` only** (the assoc/comm cases ride
   the inductive `tensorPowAdd` branch and are harder; sequence them after the base case proves the pattern).

## Do NOT re-assign without a structural change first

- `baseChangeGammaPullbackEquiv` / `baseChangeEqLocusToPullbackGamma`: blocked on items 1+2 above. Re-sending
  a prover before the signature + blueprint + `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso` are in place wastes the lane.
- `sectionsMul_one_mul` via the `:= rfl` split: dead (whnf 200000-hb timeout, build-verified). Only retry via
  the explicit functor-composition lemma (item 6).

## Unmatched lean_aux decls (1-to-1 coverage debt for the planner)
Per sgr001, the SGR helpers `gMul_def`, `sectionsCast_eq_eqToIso`, `sectionsCast_eqToIso_cancel`,
`instGMonoid`, `instGSemiring`, `instGCommSemiring` are **subsumed by existing blocks** (genuine helpers) —
the checker's verdict is they do NOT each need a new `\lean{}` block. Planner may either leave them as
helpers or add thin pointer blocks; not blocking. The one genuinely uncovered substantive decl is
`baseChangeEqLocusToPullbackGamma` (item 4). (Note: `archon dag-query unmatched` also lists many pre-existing
inherited helpers — RelativeTensorCoequalizer.*, W_*, objRestrict*, modToAb — predating this session; not
this iter's debt.)

## Reusable patterns discovered this iter
See PROJECT_STATUS.md Knowledge Base additions: (i) value-ModuleCat tmul-bilinearity diamond idiom
(`← map_add; congr 2; exact tmul_lemma`); (ii) `ModuleCat.restrictScalars` functor as the B-linear transport
when `LinearEquiv.restrictScalars` has no scalar tower; (iii) `Opens.map_iSup` forward-rewrite for base-changed
cover `iSup=⊤`; (iv) the `:= rfl` Γ-of-iso-composite split whnf-timeout trap.
